title: Weissbier: wheat and yeast
summary: Bavarian wheat beer is led by yeast character.

signals.title: Aroma
signals.body: Expect banana, clove, or bubblegum notes.

signals.title: Texture
signals.body: Wheat gives soft body and lively foam.

signals.title: Look
signals.body: Hefeweizen stays cloudy from suspended yeast.

guardrails.title: Not neutral
guardrails.body: Do not describe it like a pale lager.

guardrails.title: Lead cue
guardrails.body: Use yeast notes as the main identifier.
